## Checklist

- [ ] Branched from `develop` and targeting `develop` (not `main`)
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Destructive actions (if any) go through `ConfirmDialog` with a clear
      "what will happen / what it affects" explanation
- [ ] No PAT / API key / secret can end up in logs, browser storage, or git config
- [ ] `docs/USER-GUIDE.md` updated if user-visible behavior changed
